name: Zhejiang Hangmin Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Hangmin Co., Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells textiles in China. The company also engages in the printing and dyeing of related raw materials; thermoelectric production; shipping; and weaving, logistics, and sewage treatment activities. In addition, it offers non-woven fabrics, fiber blended fabrics, facsimile fabrics, printed fabrics, etc. The company exports its products to Southeast Asia, the Middle East, North America, the European Union, Hong Kong, Macao, and internationally. Zhejiang Hangmin Co., Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
